payload.name: Build DevOps docs platform
payload.description: Transform an existing Docusaurus DevOps blog (devops-blog) into a complete world-class DevOps documentation platform covering: Linux, Networking, Google Cloud, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, Containers, SRE, Architecture, Troubleshooting, Interview Preparation, and Labs. The site must have deep, production-first, practical content for every technology. For each technology generate: Overview, Fundamentals, Architecture, Core Concepts, All Major Services, CLI, Examples, Terraform Examples, Production Patterns, Monitoring, Security, Cost Optimization, Debugging, Labs, Interview Questions, Cheat Sheets, and Related Topics. For every service page create: Overview, When To Use, When NOT To Use, Architecture Diagram Placeholder, Core Concepts, Real Production Example, CLI Examples, Terraform Example, Common Commands, Monitoring, Security, Cost Optimization, Troubleshooting, Interview Questions, Cheat Sheet, Labs, Related Services. Site features needed: Auto Sidebar, Service Explorer, Global Search, Cross Linking, Reading Time, Code Copy, Service Comparison, Breadcrumbs, Learning Progress, Dark Mode, Diagrams. Preserve current professional UI and branding. Expand content only. No "coming soon". Every page should feel complete. Generate complete documentation hierarchy and starter content.
